full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Hafeez, Lbw!! Both batters had a brief chat but the reluctant review from Hafeez. Maybe he thought it could be high, but wasn't to be. Of all the tracks for this World Cup, Sharjah proved to have the lowest degree of bounce and no wonder this was crashing into top of leg peg. It was a skiddy length delivery on the stumps and Hafeez once again targetted leg-side, looking to launch this into the mid-wicket region. Misses it completely and was struck just around the knee roll in front of middle and leg, umpire Rod Tucker had his finger up straightaway...
